narrative:
category_one_description: The applicant is seeking proposals for Category 1 services, including Internet Access and/or Data Transmission services, to support the educational and administrative needs of the school. The requested services are intended to provide reliable, scalable, and cost-effective connectivity. Vendors must meet all FCC and USAC eligibility requirements. The applicant will evaluate all bids received in accordance with E-Rate competitive bidding rules, with price of the eligible services being the primary factor. See RFP for specifics
service_type: Data Transmission and/or Internet Access
service_category: Category 1
function: Internet Access and Data Transmission Service
minimum_capacity: 500.00 Mbps
maximum_capacity: 2048.00 Mbps
installation_initial: True
form_nickname: BETH JACOB PAROCHIAL SCHOOL FY 2026 C1
